description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist cubic design, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge. The front features a carport with a transparent roof, sheltering an orange car, and a main entryway with a small staircase. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the dark facade, providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with lounge chairs, and landscaped greenery. The house is enclosed by a hedge fence, offering privacy and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story cubic house with a flat roof, carport, large windows, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a hedge fence. The design is minimalist and contemporary with landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark facade, carport with orange car, main entryway, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, carport, and the backyard with pool and lounge area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white facade, backyard pool, and landscaped greenery within the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the hedge boundary, pool area, and the geometric structure of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small staircase, flat overhang, and a carport adjacent to the entrance.
